name: Professor Martin W Lau
title: Professor of South Asian Law | College of Law | UG Year Abroad and Junior Year Abroad Programmes Convenor
expertise_topics: Securing Women’s Rights: A Critical Analysis of the Legal and Institutional Initiatives in the Elimination of Violence Against Women in Post-2001 Afghanistan
A Critical Assessment of the Legal Framework of International Commercial Arbitration in the Onshore UAE (Towards Certainty and Modernity for an Arbitration- Friendly Jurisdiction)
Impacts of Space Activities on Environmental Rights: Towards Environmental Justice in Outer Space Governance
An analysis of the Kenyan courts' attitude towards the enforcement and annulment of arbitral awards from 1996 to 2025
biography: Professor Martin W Lau is a professor of South Asian Law.
research_interests: Securing Women’s Rights: A Critical Analysis of the Legal and Institutional Initiatives in the Elimination of Violence Against Women in Post-2001 Afghanistan; A Critical Assessment of the Legal Framework of International Commercial Arbitration in the Onshore UAE (Towards Certainty and Modernity for an Arbitration- Friendly Jurisdiction); Impacts of Space Activities on Environmental Rights: Towards Environmental Justice in Outer Space Governance; An analysis of the Kenyan courts' attitude towards the enforcement and annulment of arbitral awards from 1996 to 2025
